assignment.title: Group Presentation: Marine Ecosystem Case Study

assignment:
## Overview
Working in a team, prepare a short presentation on a marine ecosystem of your choice. Strong options include coral reefs, estuaries, mangroves, the deep sea, polar seas, kelp forests, or pelagic food-web systems.
## Required Elements
- Overview of the ecosystem’s physical setting - Key organisms and ecological interactions - One major human impact or conservation challenge - At least one evidence-based management or restoration strategy - Proper citation of any outside sources, figures, or media
## Deliverables
- Slide deck or poster file - Brief speaker notes or a short written summary - Clear identification of each group member’s contribution
## Evaluation Criteria
- Scientific accuracy - Clarity of explanation - Effective use of evidence - Visual organization - Team collaboration
